steps.trigger: PM receives Slack alert that competitor X launched a feature, or PM clicks Run Competitive Scan in dashboard
steps.user_action: Type competitor name or select from monitored list. Choose scan scope: targeted or full. Click Scan Now.
steps.user_thought: I need to understand what they shipped and whether it threatens our roadmap fast.
steps.system_response: Loading spinner with progress and estimated time. Show partial results as they arrive from different surfaces.
potential_errors: Competitor URL unreachable shows graceful error with last known scan date
accessibility_notes: Loading progress announces to screen readers
steps.mobile_variant_difference: Tap competitor name from list. Progress shown as push notification.
steps.interruption_behavior: Scan continues in background. Notification sent when complete.

steps.trigger: Scan is running. Results begin arriving from monitored surfaces.
steps.user_action: Watch live results feed. Review partial findings as they populate. Identify any errors or unreachable surfaces.
steps.user_thought: Looks like pricing page changed immediately. Let me check that first while blog scan completes.
steps.system_response: Real-time results feed: each surface result appears as it completes. Changed surfaces highlighted. Errors shown inline with retry status.
potential_errors: Surface timeout triggers retry with backoff
Rate limited surface pauses and resumes after cooldown
accessibility_notes: Results feed announces new arrivals to screen readers
Changed surfaces distinguished by icon and label, not just color
steps.mobile_variant_difference: Collapsed feed with expandable cards per surface result.
steps.interruption_behavior: Results persist if PM navigates away. Feed state maintained.

steps.trigger: Scan completes. Alert generated for each material change detected.
steps.user_action: Read alert headline and description. Review evidence source URLs. Assess severity and competitive impact.
steps.user_thought: CompetitorAlpha launched AI PRD generation. This directly overlaps with our V10 roadmap. I need to brief the CTO.
steps.system_response: Alert card displayed with: headline, severity badge, competitive impact summary, affected artifacts list, recommended PM action, suggested response timeframe.
potential_errors: Alert may classify severity incorrectly based on thin evidence
Multiple alerts from same scan overwhelm PM
accessibility_notes: Severity communicated by both color and label
steps.mobile_variant_difference: Stacked alert cards with priority sort.
steps.interruption_behavior: Alerts marked as new persist until acknowledged. Acknowledged alerts archived.

steps.trigger: PM opens competitive feature matrix to compare current state against new competitor capabilities.
steps.user_action: Navigate to feature matrix view. Compare per-feature capability scores. Review differentiation summary and gap analysis.
steps.user_thought: We lead on 10 features but they just caught up on PRD generation. Our overall score is still ahead but the gap is narrowing.
steps.system_response: Interactive matrix: columns for competitors, rows for feature categories. Scores color-coded. Differentiation summary auto-updated. Gap analysis surfaced.
potential_errors: Feature scores may be outdated for some competitors
Differentiation assessment may not account for unreleased features
accessibility_notes: Arrow key navigation for cell-by-cell comparison
steps.mobile_variant_difference: Stacked cards per feature category with expandable competitor comparisons.
steps.interruption_behavior: Matrix view state persisted. Filters and sort maintained.

cognitive_load_profile.load_distribution: Lightweight throughout — the journey is designed for speed. Only step 4 (review comparison) has moderate cognitive load during interpretation.
mitigation_suggestions: Pre-fill competitor list from radar state — PM shouldn't have to remember competitor names
Default scan scope to 'targeted' for single competitor — fewer decisions = faster flow

error_paths.most_common_error: Competitor surface unreachable (429 rate limit or 403 blocked)
error_paths.error_discovery_mechanism: System detects during scan — surfaces graceful error inline: 'competitorAlpha.com/pricing returned 429. Retrying in 60s. Last known good scan: 2 days ago.'
recovery_paths: Use last known good data with staleness warning
Skip unreachable surface and complete scan with partial data — clearly labeled
prevention_suggestions: Implement exponential backoff and rotating user agents
Pre-cache competitor surfaces during scheduled scans to reduce latency during PM-requested scans

accessibility_assessment.screen_reader_findings: All interactive elements have labels. Loading states announced. Results tables have proper header associations. Comparison chart needs alt text describing key findings.
accessibility_assessment.keyboard_navigation_findings: All triggers keyboard accessible. Tab order follows visual layout. Results matrix needs arrow key navigation for cell-by-cell review.
accessibility_assessment.contrast_findings: Primary interaction elements pass 4.5:1 contrast. Alert badges (red/green) need 3:1 minimum — current design meets this.
improvement_items: Screen reader announcement of real-time result updates as they arrive

multi_device_continuity.cross_device_flow: Scan can be initiated on desktop, results viewable on tablet for mobile review during meetings. State syncs via workspace.
multi_device_continuity.state_persistence: Scan results persist indefinitely (linked to competitor_radar_state). PM can revisit scan from 3 months ago to compare changes.
multi_device_continuity.layout_differences: Desktop: side-by-side comparison matrix with full detail. Tablet: stacked cards with key metrics; tap to expand detail.

first_time_vs_returning.first_time_experience: First-time user sees guided setup: 'Select competitors to monitor' with auto-populated list from competitor_dossier. Explains what scanning does and what it does not do (competitive intelligence, not automated decision-making). Estimated time to first scan: 2 minutes.
first_time_vs_returning.returning_experience: Returning user sees competitor list with 'last scanned: X ago' badges. Click competitor to scan. Keyboard power users: Cmd+K 'scan [competitor]' completes in <3 seconds.
first_time_vs_returning.progressive_disclosure_strategy: Day 1: basic scan → alert → PM review. Week 2: auto-scheduled scans with digest. Month 2: auto-alert routing to affected artifacts (battle cards, strategy briefs).

offline_scenarios.offline_behavior: Cannot initiate scan offline — requires network access to fetch competitor surfaces. Last known scan results cached and viewable offline.
offline_scenarios.sync_strategy: Results cached locally. On reconnect, compares cached results with server state — if server has newer scan, replaces local cache.

multi_user_actions: PM initiates scan — results visible to entire product team workspace
Engineering lead views competitive feature matrix for technical capability comparison
async_handoff_points: PM adds annotation to scan result: '@eng-lead can you evaluate if competitor's new API capability affects our architecture?'

notification_handling.frequency_policy: Scan complete notification: in-app immediately, email only for critical/high severity alerts. Digest: daily summary of all competitive changes (low/medium severity aggregated).
notification_handling.user_control: Full per-competitor notification settings. PM can mute low-severity competitor for 30 days. Critical alerts always notify regardless of settings.

keyboard_shortcuts: Cmd+Shift+A → acknowledge all alerts for current competitor
templates_and_presets: Saved scan configurations: 'Weekly Full Scan' (all competitors, all surfaces), 'CompetitorAlpha Deep Dive' (single competitor, all surfaces + social mining), 'Quick Pricing Check' (pricing pages only, all primary competitors)
